name: ghostty-web-server
description: Local web server that exposes a shell PTY through a ghostty-web terminal in the browser

scripts.build: bun build src/client.tsx --outdir dist --target browser --minify --define 'process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' && bun build src/server.tsx --outdir dist --target bun --minify --define 'process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' && bun scripts/postbuild.ts
scripts.build:bin: bun build src/client.tsx --outdir dist --target browser --minify --define 'process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' && bun build --compile --minify --bytecode --define 'process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' --target=${TARGET:-bun} src/server.tsx --outfile ${OUTFILE:-dist/ghostty-web-server}

author: Coder
